title: Galactic Congress (Zhotta 3)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Galactic Congress''' was a meetings of delegates hosted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to determine the future of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] invited the leaders of the world, [[Zhotta 3]] to attend.

[[Kaysil Verwood]] represented the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]] of [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]] and its colony worlds during this congress.

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Rebel leader Han Solo and his Wookiee partner Chewbacca have just completed an important diplomatic mission, inviting leaders of the nearby planet Zhotta 3 to the Galactic Congress which will decide how the Galaxy, now freed from Imperial rule, shall be governed.|Narrator|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 84">[[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]]</ref>}}
Due to the nature of the storyline in [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel Star Wars]] at this time, the Rebel heroes are going from world to world to invite planetary leaders to attend a diplomatic convention of worlds on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. Since other members that Solo visited, such as in [[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]], were seen at the [[First Conference of Free Peoples]], it is very likely that the Galactic Congress mentioned in this issue is the same as that conference. As a result, it may be related to the [[Constitutional Convention]].

''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' mentions that [[Kaysil Verwood]] was the first representative to the "Galactic Caucus of the New Republic". This may be simply another name for this meeting of worlds.
